title: alchemilla vulgaris var. montana
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. montana, also known as the lady's mantle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent qualities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, relieving menstrual cramps, and reducing swelling in wounds. Alchemilla vulgaris var. montana is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in creams and ointments to promote skin and wound healing.
